content: Cost blowouts: ElevenLabs bills per character (Flash ~0.5-1 credit/char); teams commonly hit overages in month 2-3. Long agent monologues burn credits fastest — interrupted speech that was synthesized but never heard still bills. Abandoned sessions: pipecat idle detection (default 5min) has known reliability bugs (#3140 on_idle_timeout not firing after dead WebRTC peer, #3179 pipeline not canceled on disconnect) — belt-and-suspenders server-side max session timer required. Connection duration = billed duration for conversational plans.
